name: UT ACM Datathon 2026
description: Annual datathon hosted by UT Austin's ACM chapter. Teams of 2-4 tackle a surprise dataset over 24 hours. Last year Westwood placed 2nd overall.

name: Westwood Intra-Club Challenge — Spring
description: Month-long internal challenge. This semester's theme was 'AI for Good' — build something that helps the school or Austin community.

name: FIRST Robotics x AI Challenge
description: New track from FIRST where teams design an AI-assisted autonomous routine for a simulated robot task. Submissions judged on performance and technical writeup.

name: Kaggle NLP Open Challenge
description: Ongoing Kaggle competition on multi-label text classification. Good warm-up for fall semester — low barrier to entry, high learning value.

name: TechX High School ML Bowl 2025
description: Multi-round competition where high school teams train models on a private dataset and are ranked on leaderboard. Westwood sent 3 teams.

name: Westwood Intra-Club Challenge — Fall
description: Fall semester's internal challenge — theme was 'Visualizing Data.' Focused on ML pipelines with strong data storytelling.
